description_long: This object consists of two pairs of curtains, each pair tied back at the bottom, with one set in a light lavender color and the other in a deep burgundy. The curtains are made from a soft, draping fabric that falls in gentle folds, suggesting a lightweight textile such as polyester or cotton blend. The fabric is solid in color with no visible patterns or embellishments, and the curtains are gathered at the top, likely to accommodate a rod or similar mounting hardware. The tied-back design creates an open, inviting appearance, allowing for light to pass through the window space they would cover. The overall look is simple and modern, suitable for residential or commercial urban interiors. The curtains are presented as a group, with each color set mirrored on either side.
description: A set of two pairs of tied-back curtains, one lavender and one burgundy, made from soft, solid-colored fabric. The curtains are gathered at the top and designed for a modern, urban interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lavender and burgundy curtain pairs, each tied back and fully visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the curtains compressed into a thin profile, with the folds and ties barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the burgundy curtains on the left and lavender on the right, both tied back and fully visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curtains as a thin vertical line.
